author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Plan: (1) Add SyncManager::git_commit_in_cache() that checks local/worktree commit.gpgsign config — sign if explicitly configured, bypass if inherited global. (2) Migrate 5 SyncManager commit sites and 2 SharedWriter commit sites to use signing-aware method. (3) Auto-run agent init during crosslink init so signing is always available from the start.
